metadata.description: Personal Claude/Cowork plugin marketplace for Brandon Johnwell. Holds plugins that codify writing, clarification, and project preferences.

plugins.name: cowork-prefs
plugins.description: Brandon's personal Claude/Cowork preferences. Currently includes the conversational-questioning skill (caps AskUserQuestion at 1 question per round by default).

plugins.name: layerup-video-sort
plugins.description: Sort and organize unedited Layer Up phone videos from ~/Downloads into Drafts/ topic folders, with a per-folder CapCut AI Clipper prompt. Layer Up taxonomy and brand defaults baked in.
